programme.desc: Tim and Jill's plans to spend some time together are interrupted when Tim's brother and Jill's sister announce that they are an item.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Brad tries to convince his parents to let him play professional soccer in Europe instead of going to college.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) doesn't understand why Al (Richard Karn) has trouble accepting extravagant gifts from his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Vanessa thinks Eve should be more supportive of having a woman president; Mike and Mandy wonder what they have in common.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Boyd is suspended from school, Mike wants Ryan to look into private schools; Kristin and Kyle are faced with a raccoon in the Outdoor Man restaurant.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike looks forward to spending alone time in the garage with his new 1967 Impala, but the car's previous owner keeps showing up with uninvited advice; Vanessa lets Eve go to a music festival, angering Mandy.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Mike and Chuck decide to spend Halloween watching football instead of passing out candy, their wives decide to prank them; Kyle dresses up as Ed.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: In order for Eric to graduate he must take a P.E. class, but when he learns that Casey Kelso is the gym coach, his nerves get the best of him.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric learns that his parents have spent all of his college savings, so he must find a way to finance the next four years.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When the son of Red's Navy buddy (Bret Harrison) comes to visit, the gang is immediately put off by his lack of life experience.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: As Eric prepares to leave for Africa, he and the guys get together in the basement one last time, but when Red learns what they've been doing, he cuts their reminiscing short.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Sean (Donal Logue) and the boys are chased by angry sports fans after he causes the Yankees to lose a game.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Sean and Claudia (Donal Logue, Megyn Price) are dismayed when Walt (Richard Riehle) gives Jimmy (Griffin Frazen) a BB gun for his birthday.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Take This Job and Shove It Twice
programme.desc: Darlene receives a promotion at her company, but she quickly learns the fancy title is not all it's cracked up to be; when Louise loses her job at Casita Bonita, an opportunity arises to work with Jackie at the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Of Missing Minds and Missing Fries
programme.desc: Jackie must come to terms with her mother becoming ill; Darlene's job hunt proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: On this hidden-camera prank show, everyday people get caught up in gags with hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: On this hidden-camera prank show, everyday people get caught up in gags with hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Car accident? Free Legal Consultation
programme.desc: Legal professionals standing by to answer your questions.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle Is Here… & It is a Once-In-A-Lifetime Coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: Hilarious pigs take a roll in the dirt, troublemakers make a mess of a kitchen, and there's some playtime in the sand.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: The video dance revolution; crazy family game nights; grandma's rendition of lively entertainment.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Red fires Eric from his job at Pricemart after hearing about his engagement; Nina invites Fez to spend the night with her.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When Annette (guest star Jessica Simpson) visits Kelso, Jackie must conceal her jealousy from Hyde. Tom Poston and Betty White also guest star.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim's free-spirited college pal (Christopher McDonald) drives Jill (Patricia Richardson) crazy when he comes to visit. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Brad prepares for his first date with Jennifer; Jill's feminist girlfriend Karen is expected to visit.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) asks for a sentimental birthday gift, so Tim (Tim Allen) shops for lingerie.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and guest Bob Vila test their knowledge in a competition on "Tool Time.".

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: A middle-aged businessman falls for his cardiac nurse -- a Nigerian immigrant -- while recovering from a heart attack and sets his sights on winning her over.

programme.desc: A middle-aged businessman falls for his cardiac nurse -- a Nigerian immigrant -- while recovering from a heart attack and sets his sights on winning her over.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim helps Andy pick up a beautiful woman at the bar, but she turns out to be crazy.

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.sub-title: A New Place for One of Our People
programme.desc: Mike attempts to teach Eve a hard lesson about life, but Eve's reaction throws Mike for a loop; Kyle attempts bartering to get Mandy an amazing wedding gift.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy's volatile pre-wedding day behavior causes Ed to opt out of the festivities, leaving Mandy to find a new best man for Kyle.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike wants Chuck to sell him the car he recently inherited, but Joe is after the same thing; Kyle brings an ugly centerpiece for Thanksgiving dinner; Kristin and Ryan lay down the law after learning Eve's boyfriend stayed the night.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike considers whether to follow the politically correct guidelines for his speech at Mandy's graduation; Eve's friend's boasting about her life away at college leaves Eve feeling discouraged.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue at their flip house; Joe is enjoying hanging out with his nurse and wants to find a way to get him to stay with him longer than planned.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl's mother has plans for the afterlife that would put everyone in a large family plot she reserved years ago, but Jim insists on his own family plot, conveniently located next to that of a star football player.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim becomes the prey of a 40-pound psychotic turkey named Angry Pete during a Thanksgiving hunt with Andy.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl's doctor puts sex off-limits until the time is right for conception; Jim eats crow to win a huge account from a blowhard potential client (Tom Arnold).

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Jim gets into an accident with a department store Santa, an altercation ensues that leaves his on-looking kids fearing Santa will not bring them any gifts.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) becomes a murder suspect after Wilson (Earl Hindman) disappears following a Halloween party. With Patricia Richardson.

programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) accidentally tells Heidi (Debbe Dunning) that her husband is seeing one of Jill's (Patricia Richardson) patients.

programme.desc: When Tim's (Tim Allen) first car is junked, Jill (Patricia Richardson) decides to find him an exact replica.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike has a difficult time treating Kristin like an employee rather than his daughter; Kyle and Mandy hope Ed wants their help rekindling his romance with Wendi.

programme.desc: When Eve's annoying friend needs a place to stay, Mike tries to pawn her off on someone else; conflict ensues after Kristin asks Mandy to design new uniforms for the Outdoor Man Grill.

programme.desc: Vanessa is upset when Eve doesn't want to participate in a holiday tradition; Kristin learns that Mandy is lying about where she and Kyle will be on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: Classically-trained bass/baritone Gene McDonald showcases the rich, warm tones that have made him a Gaither Homecoming favorite; featuring an interview by host Bill Gaither, Forgiven and Free is a personal tribute.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: True patience means pressing on in faith; Joyce says waiting on God with the right attitude brings strength, joy and lasting transformation.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Jerusalem's role in both world and biblical history, and in the events surrounding the return of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt Crouch hosts Reza Safa.

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: The Mark Trammell Quartet; Signature Sound and the LeFevres; host Jason Crabb and The Isaacs on the Red Carpet.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Insights -- Israel and the Middle East
programme.desc: A central theme in the life and times of Jesus, the Sea of Galilee is a living legacy of history, harmony and support.

programme.sub-title: The Signs and Secrets of Transformation (Part 1)

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Javen hosts Todd Dulaney.

programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.desc: Learn three simple keys to unlock God's power in your daily life and start living as an overcomer today.
